creator: freebsd-bugzilla-10a4271f-48f8-4424-a4e0-388fcb519c16@m.shiggles.org
text:
Installed via binary package, fails to run after latest pkg update / pkg upgrade

$ borgmatic

/usr/local/etc/borgmatic/config.yaml /usr/local/etc/borgmatic.d /home/meow/.config/borgmatic/config.yaml /home/meow/.config/borgmatic.d: No valid configuration files found

summary:
/home/meow/.config/borgmatic/config.yaml: Error parsing configuration file
[Errno 2] No such file or directory: '/usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages/jsonschema/schemas/vocabularies'
/usr/local/etc/borgmatic/config.yaml /usr/local/etc/borgmatic.d /home/meow/.config/borgmatic/config.yaml /home/meow/.config/borgmatic.d: No valid configuration files found

Need some help? https://torsion.org/borgmatic/#issues

The ~/.config/borgmatic/config.yaml file does exist, borgmatic worked without issue until the latest round of package updates.

# uname -mr
